site.title: Catechism for Africa
site.hero_title: Faith Formation for Every African Catholic
site.hero_subtitle: Comprehensive catechetical resources designed for parishes, dioceses, and individuals seeking deeper understanding of the Catholic faith.

videos.title: Introduction to the RCIA Journey
videos.description: An overview of the Rite of Christian Initiation of Adults, its stages, and what candidates can expect.

videos.title: The Period of Inquiry & Evangelization
videos.description: Understanding the pre-catechumenate phase and how to accompany those first exploring the Catholic faith.

videos.title: The Sacrament of Baptism
videos.description: Exploring the theology, ritual, and significance of Baptism as the gateway to Christian life.

videos.title: The Holy Eucharist: Source & Summit
videos.description: A deep dive into the Real Presence, the Mass, and the centrality of the Eucharist in Catholic life.

videos.title: Reconciliation & God's Mercy
videos.description: Understanding the Sacrament of Penance, its healing power, and the beauty of divine mercy.

videos.title: Introduction to the Old Testament
videos.description: Navigating the Hebrew Scriptures: historical books, wisdom literature, and the prophetic tradition.

videos.title: The Four Gospels: Portrait of Christ
videos.description: Comparing Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John to understand the richness of the Gospel tradition.

videos.title: Catholic Social Teaching in Africa
videos.description: Applying the Church's social doctrine to contemporary African challenges: justice, dignity, and solidarity.

videos.title: Building a Personal Prayer Life
videos.description: Practical guidance on developing consistent prayer habits: lectio divina, the Rosary, and contemplation.
